title: Equation Anchors Example
text:
The following unlabeled display equation should include an anchor link on the left:
\[
x^2 + y^2 = z^2
\]
The following labeled display equation also gets an anchor link:
\[
f(x) = \int_{-\infty}^{\infty} e^{-t^2} \, dt
\tag{1}\]
You can also reference it as Equation 1.

title: equation-anchors
text:
This extension adds permalink anchors to display equations.
Use quarto add d-morrison/equation-anchors in your Quarto project, then enable the filter:
filters:
  - d-morrison/equation-anchors
See example.qmd for a minimal working example, or open the rendered example page.
